content: We can frame Self-Refine's single-chain iterative self-improvement workflow as the base layer for a multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanism, creating a nested reflection structure where the global multi-perspective inconsistency checking feeds targeted refinement tasks to the local Self-Refine iteration loop. This structure eliminates the need for both supervised training data and external test cases while leveraging divergent problem-solving perspectives to catch blind spots that single-chain self-refinement can miss.
